title: Mario Paint Composer - Quacker Jack (Darkwing Duck)
description:
You can thank CommanderGwonam for my discovering this I guess. It's totally my kind of tune, but I never did play the game back in the day so I'd never heard it until just now.

His version's still better anyway.

The rhythm on this one was pretty dastardly for someone like me who doesn't know the first thing about sheet music. It's something hoopty like 4/5 or 5/4 or whatever. Took a bit of figuring out.
